rows.label: tev073402_SEL0021
rows.name:
Ask Ten'celeg if he's heard
any interesting rumors.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev073401_MSG0001
rows.name:
Sun'celeg seems to have performed all of the
jobs at Orphe Parfait, from development to
production, almost entirely by himself.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev073401_MSG0002
rows.name:
He had so much vitality and such a stunning
understanding of all manner of technology.
Our Union parent was truly a great Orphean.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev073401_MSG0003
rows.name:
Currently, Tan'celeg is using the intelligence
he inherited from Sun'celeg to handle developmental
duties, while I handle production.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev073401_MSG0004
rows.name:
Our products remain as high in quality as ever. In
fact, they may be slightly improved due to the
additional experience acquired by Tan'celeg and I.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev073401_MSG0005
rows.name:
Such is the power of Ovah. We pass our
strengths down undiminished for
successive generations to build upon.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev073401_MSG0010
rows.name:
I understand that the ancient artifacts
called joadtanks can be acquired at
Nightglow Forest's Divine Roost.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev073401_MSG0011
rows.name:
Likewise, spherical EM motors can be gathered in
the rocky mountains near Nightglow Forest's Ensconced
Citadel—although I hear they're quite rare.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev073401_MSG0012
rows.name:
Finally, bananaleaves can be acquired at
Nightglow Forest's Elephant's Trunk and Humdrum
Peaks areas. I believe that is all of it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev073401_MSG1001
rows.name:
Tan'celeg has apparently relocated
to the Biahno water-purification
plant to protect it from invaders.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev073401_MSG1002
rows.name:
At first, I did not understand why
he would risk his own survival by
traveling to such a dangerous area.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev073401_MSG1003
rows.name:
But I have begun to suspect that
rational self-sacrifice may also be
a part of the Orphe way of life.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev073401_MSG1004
rows.name:
I also strive to be the sort of Orphean
that would gladly heed my Ovah's orders
to sacrifice myself when necessary.[ST:wait ]
